headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3. H1 should be massive (text-5xl to text-7xl). Tracking tight.

body.usage: Use for body text, inputs, and UI elements. Tracking normal to wide.

mono.usage: Use for time slots, prices, and IDs.

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle grain overlay (opacity 0.03) on backgrounds to avoid flat digital look.

landing_page.description: Asymmetric bento grid. Large typography. Parallax scrolling.
landing_page.hero_section: Full screen height. Background image with 'Dark Void' gradient overlay. Gold H1.

dashboard.description: Sidebar navigation (Owner). Compact tables. 'Cardless' look using dividers.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-[#b5952f] rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest font-bold px-8 py-6
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-border text-foreground hover:border-primary hover:text-primary rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-6

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-border focus:border-primary rounded-none px-0 py-4 text-lg focus:ring-0
inputs.label: uppercase text-xs tracking-widest text-muted-foreground mb-2

cards.style: bg-card border border-border rounded-none p-8 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300

motion.hover_effects: Scale 1.02 on images. Text color shift on links.

hero_main.alt: Master barber performing a precision cut
hero_main.usage: Hero section background or split screen main image

tools_detail.alt: Vintage gold and steel barber tools

instructions_to_main_agent: IMPLEMENT DARK MODE DEFAULT: Ensure 'dark' class is always applied to html/body.
NO ROUNDED CORNERS: This brand is sharp and masculine. Use 'rounded-none' or 'rounded-sm' at most.
GOLD IS HOLY: Use the gold accent color sparingly but effectively (Buttons, Active States, Key Highlights).
SPACE IS LUXURY: Double the padding. If you think 'p-4' is enough, use 'p-8'.
MOBILE FIRST: Ensure all grids collapse to 1 column on mobile.
USE SHADCN: Heavily customize Shadcn components to match the 'rounded-none' and 'gold' aesthetic.
